items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
With the many soccer posts on this site, a big reminder.

Netflix holds the exclusive live broadcasting rights in the US and Canada for the FIFA Women's World Cup in 2027 and 2031.

Will be a major change for WC viewers.
